name: Lumbar Spine MRI Without Contrast
description: Standard lumbar spine MRI report template without contrast

findings.technique: MRI of the lumbar spine was performed using T1, T2, and STIR sequences in sagittal and axial planes without contrast.
findings.comparison: No prior spine imaging available for comparison.

sections.name: Vertebral Body Morphology
sections.content: Vertebral body heights are [preserved / diminished]. No compression fracture identified. Endplate changes are [minimal /moderate / severe].

sections.name: Disc Levels
sections.content:
At L1-L2: [no disc bulge / disc bulge / disc protrusion] with [no / mild / moderate / severe] canal stenosis.
At L2-L3: [no disc bulge / disc bulge / disc protrusion] with [no / mild / moderate / severe] canal stenosis.
At L3-L4: [no disc bulge / disc bulge / disc protrusion] with [no / mild / moderate / severe] canal stenosis.
At L4-L5: [no disc bulge / disc bulge / disc protrusion] with [no / mild / moderate / severe] canal stenosis.
At L5-S1: [no disc bulge / disc bulge / disc protrusion] with [no / mild / moderate / severe] canal stenosis.

sections.name: Spinal Canal
sections.content: The spinal canal [does not demonstrate / demonstrates] significant stenosis at all levels evaluated.

sections.name: Neural Foramina
sections.content: Neural foramina [are patent / show mild / show moderate / show severe] narrowing bilaterally.

sections.name: Conus Medullaris
sections.content: The conus medullaris terminates at [normal level / low-lying]. No abnormal signal within the cord.

impression:
1. [No significant abnormality / Disc degeneration with mild canal stenosis] at L4-L5.
2. [No acute process / Recommend clinical correlation].
author: RadReport Templates
